If you receive a validation error of 92203 or if your dynamic descriptors are not displaying as expected, please Braintree Support.

Što je jasniji opis proizvoda, manje su šanse da će kupci tražiti povrat zbog greške ili nejasnoća. Dinamički opisi nisu automatski omogućeni na svim nalozima. All:
Why Advertise Financing?
Give your sales a boost when you advertise financing.
PayPal helps turn browsers into buyers with financing from PayPal Credit®. Your customers have more time to pay, while you get paid up front – at no additional cost to you. Use PayPal’s free banner ads that let you advertise PayPal Credit® financing as a payment option when your customers check out with PayPal. The PayPal Advertising Program has been shown to generate additional purchases as well as increase consumer's average purchase sizes by 15% or more. See Details.
Sve:
Zašto oglašavati finansiranje?
Povećajte prodaju kada oglašavate finansiranje.
PayPal pomaže da pretvorite posetioce u kupce sa finansiranjem iz PayPal Credit®. Vaši kupci imaju više vremena da plate, dok vi dobijate uplatu unapred – bez dodatnih troškova. Koristite PayPal besplatne baner oglase koji vam omogućavaju da oglašavate PayPal Credit® finansiranje kao opciju plaćanja kada vaši kupci plaćaju sa PayPal-om. Dokazano je da PayPal program oglašavanja generiše dodatne kupovine i povećava prosečnu veličinu kupovine za 15% ili više. Pogledajte detalje.

Use PayPal’s free banner ads that let you advertise PayPal Credit® financing as a payment option when your customers check out with PayPal. The PayPal Advertising Program has been shown to generate additional purchases as well as increase consumer's average purchase sizes by 15% or more. See Details.
Sve:
Zašto oglašavati finansiranje?
Povećajte prodaju kada oglašavate finansiranje.
PayPal pomaže da pretvorite posetioce u kupce sa finansiranjem iz PayPal Credit®. Vaši kupci imaju više vremena da plate, dok vi dobijate uplatu unapred – bez dodatnih troškova. Koristite PayPal besplatne baner oglase koji vam omogućavaju da oglašavate PayPal Credit® finansiranje kao opciju plaćanja kada vaši kupci plaćaju sa PayPal-om. Dokazano je da PayPal program oglašavanja generiše dodatne kupovine i povećava prosečnu veličinu kupovine za 15% ili više. Pogledajte detalje.

All:
Magento 2.2.4 provides powerful new tools to help reduce cart abandonment and simplify store operations:


Trusted Payment Options

Online or on the go, your shoppers can easily purchase in a familiar, trusted way with Amazon Pay.

Flexible Payment Terms

Increase sales by providing shoppers with the flexibility to pay now, later, or in installments using Klarna’s integrated payment option.

Sales and Use Tax Automation

Merchants can now automatically perform instant and accurate sales tax calculations on shopping cart items with Vertex Cloud.

To learn more, see the Release Notes and the Magento User Guide.
Sve:
Magento 2.2.4 pruža moćne nove alate koji pomažu u smanjenju napuštanja korpe i pojednostavljuju operacije prodavnice:


Pouzdane opcije plaćanja

Online ili u pokretu, vaši kupci mogu lako kupiti na poznat, pouzdan način sa Amazon Pay.

Fleksibilni uslovi plaćanja

Povećajte prodaju pružajući kupcima fleksibilnost da plate sada, kasnije, ili na rate koristeći Klarna integrisanu opciju plaćanja.

Automatizacija poreza na promet

Trgovci sada mogu automatski da izvršavaju trenutne i tačne obračune poreza na promet na stavke u korpi sa Vertex Cloud.

Da saznate više, pogledajte Beleške o izdanju and the Magento korisnički vodič.

All:
With Amazon Pay, we make it simple for the hundreds of millions of Amazon customers worldwide to easily log in and purchase from your store using information already stored their Amazon account. With easy setup in Magento 2.2.4, Amazon Pay provides your customers with a trusted and familiar checkout experience. In just a few taps, they can complete a transaction without ever leaving your site.

  • Your customers use one familiar login to identify themselves and transact anywhere Amazon Pay is offered.
  • Checkout experience is covered by the Amazon A-to-z Guarantee at no additional cost.
  • Built on years of Amazon eCommerce innovation, and trusted by merchants and buyers alike.
  • Available across platforms and devices, in the home and on the go.
Sve:
With Amazon Pay, Činimo jednostavnim za stotine miliona Amazon kupaca širom sveta da se lako prijave i kupe iz vaše prodavnice koristeći informacije koje su već sačuvane u njihovom Amazon nalogu. Uz jednostavno podešavanje u Magento 2.2.4, Amazon Pay pruža vašim kupcima pouzdano i poznato iskustvo naplate. U samo nekoliko dodira, mogu završiti transakciju bez napuštanja vašeg sajta.

  • Vaši kupci koriste jedan poznati login da se identifikuju i obavljaju transakcije bilo gde gde je Amazon Pay dostupan.
  • Iskustvo naplate je pokriveno Amazon A-to-z garantijom bez dodatnih troškova.
  • Izgrađeno na godinama Amazon eCommerce inovacija, i pouzdano od strane trgovaca i kupaca.
  • Dostupno na svim platformama i uređajima, kod kuće i u pokretu.

All:
With Klarna, reduce purchase stress and improve your shopping experience with several retail finance and direct-payment options that are easily integrated into your existing buying journey. Shoppers can choose to pay now by online payment or direct debit, pay later by invoice, or pay in installments.

  • Customers never leave your site, and enjoy a smoother shopping experience.
  • Easy application process with the ability to pay over time increases average order value and conversion rates.
  • Assumes all credit and fraud risk, and ensures you are paid for ordered goods.
  • Ready for all devices, and enables shoppers to use their Klarna account at any Klarna merchant with just a few clicks.
  • Fast and easy setup, right from the Magento Admin.
Sve:
With Klarna, smanjite stres pri kupovini i poboljšajte iskustvo kupovine sa nekoliko opcija finansiranja i direktnog plaćanja koje se lako integrišu u vaše postojeće putovanje kupovine. Kupci mogu izabrati da plate sada online plaćanjem ili direktnim zaduženjem, plate kasnije putem fakture, ili plate na rate.

  • Kupci nikada ne napuštaju vaš sajt i uživaju u glatkijem iskustvu kupovine.
  • Jednostavan proces prijave sa mogućnošću plaćanja na rate povećava prosečnu vrednost porudžbine i stope konverzije.
  • Preuzima sav kreditni rizik i rizik od prevara i osigurava da budete plaćeni za naručenu robu.
  • Spreman za sve uređaje i omogućava kupcima da koriste svoj Klarna nalog kod bilo kog Klarna trgovca sa samo nekoliko klikova.
  • Brzo i jednostavno podešavanje, direktno iz Magento Admina.

All:
Vertex Cloud combines sophisticated software with an exceptional team of tax experts to help Magento merchants simplify the sales tax process, and comply with ever-changing tax laws. Merchants can easily access and configure Vertex Cloud from the Magento Admin to meet complex tax challenges.

  • Seamless integration with award-winning support for simple-to-complex tax needs.
  • Automatically comply with the latest tax rules for each product and every jurisdiction.
  • Perform tax calculations and generate signature-ready PDF returns in one solution.
  • No penalty to merchants for tax estimates from abandoned carts.
  • Flexible deployment options fit the needs of your organization in the cloud, or on premises.
Sve:
Vertex Cloud kombinuje sofisticirani softver sa izuzetnim timom poreskih stručnjaka kako bi pomogao Magento trgovcima da pojednostave proces poreza na promet i usklade se sa stalno promenljivim poreskim zakonima. Trgovci mogu lako pristupiti i konfigurisati Vertex Cloud iz Magento Admina kako bi odgovorili na složene poreske izazove.

  • Besprekorna integracija sa nagrađivanom podrškom za jednostavne do složenih poreskih potreba.
  • Automatski se uskladite sa najnovijim poreskim pravilima za svaki proizvod i svaku jurisdikciju.
  • Izvršite obračun poreza i generišite PDF prijave spremne za potpis u jednom rešenju.
  • Bez kazni za trgovce za procene poreza iz napuštenih korpi.
  • Fleksibilne opcije implementacije odgovaraju potrebama vaše organizacije u oblaku ili na sopstvenim serverima.

All:
Magento 2.2.2 offers advanced new features, including:


Advanced Reporting

Gain valuable insights through a dynamic suite of product, order, and customer reports, powered by Magento Business Intelligence.

Instant Purchase

Simplify ordering and boost conversion rates by allowing your customers to use stored payment and shipping information to skip tedious checkout steps.

Email Marketing Automation

Send smarter, faster email campaigns with marketing automation from dotmailer, powered by your Magento store's live data.

Release notes and additional details can be found at Magento DevDocs.
Sve:
Magento 2.2.2 nudi napredne nove funkcije, uključujući:


Napredno izveštavanje

Dobijte vredne uvide kroz dinamičan skup izveštaja o proizvodima, porudžbinama i kupcima, pokretan od strane Magento Business Intelligence.

Trenutna kupovina

Pojednostavite naručivanje i povećajte stope konverzije omogućavajući vašim kupcima da koriste sačuvane informacije o plaćanju i isporuci kako bi preskočili zamorne korake naplate.

Automatizacija email marketinga

Šaljite pametnije, brže email kampanje sa automatizacijom marketinga iz dotmailer-a, pokretane podacima uživo vaše Magento prodavnice.

Beleške o izdanju i dodatni detalji mogu se pronaći na Magento DevDocs.

All:
Advanced Reporting provides you with a dynamic suite of reports with rich insights about the health of your business.


As part of the Advanced Reporting service, we may also use your customer data for such purposes as benchmarking, improving our products and services, and providing you with new and improved analytics.


By using Magento 2.2.2, you agree to the Advanced Reporting Privacy Policy and Terms of Service. You may opt out at any time from the Stores Configuration page.
Sve:
Napredno izveštavanje pruža vam dinamičan skup izveštaja sa bogatim uvidima o zdravlju vašeg poslovanja.


As part of the Napredno izveštavanje service, we may also use your customer data for such purposes as benchmarking, improving our products and services, and providing you with new and improved analytics.


Korišćenjem Magento 2.2.2, prihvatate Politiku privatnosti and Uslove korišćenja. Možete se odjaviti u bilo kom trenutku sa stranice Konfiguracije prodavnica.

All:
Now you can deliver an Amazon-like experience with a new, streamlined checkout option. Logged-in customers can use previously-stored payment credentials and shipping information to skip steps, making the process faster and easier, especially for mobile shoppers. Key features include:

  • Configurable “Instant Purchase” button to place orders.
  • Support for all payment solutions using Braintree Vault, including Braintree Credit Card, Braintree PayPal, and PayPal Payflow Pro.
  • Shipping to the customer’s default address using the lowest cost, available shipping method.
  • Ability for developers to customize the Instant Purchase business logic to meet merchant needs.
Sve:
Sada možete pružiti Amazon-slično iskustvo sa novom, pojednostavljenom opcijom naplate. Prijavljeni kupci mogu koristiti prethodno sačuvane akreditive za plaćanje i informacije o isporuci da preskoče korake, čineći proces bržim i lakšim, posebno za mobilne kupce. Ključne karakteristike uključuju:

  • Configurable “Trenutna kupovina” button to place orders.
  • Podrška za sva rešenja plaćanja koja koriste Braintree Vault, uključujući Braintree kreditnu karticu, Braintree PayPal i PayPal Payflow Pro.
  • Isporuka na podrazumevanu adresu kupca koristeći najjeftiniji, dostupni način isporuke.
  • Ability for developers to customize the Trenutna kupovina business logic to meet merchant needs.

All:
Unlock an unparalleled level of insight and control of your eCommerce marketing with dotmailer Email Marketing Automation. Included with Magento 2.2.2 for easy set-up, dotmailer ensures every customer’s journey is captured, segmented, and personalized, enabling you to deliver customer-centric campaigns that beat your results over and over again. Benefits include:

  • No obligation 14-day trial.
  • Automation campaigns using your live Magento store data that drive revenue, including abandoned cart, abandoned browse, product replenishment, and many more.
  • Built-in solution for transactional emails.
  • Telephone support and advice from marketing experts included.
Sve:
Unlock an unparalleled level of insight and control of your eCommerce marketing with dotmailer Automatizacija email marketinga. Included with Magento 2.2.2 for easy set-up, dotmailer ensures every customer’s journey is captured, segmented, and personalized, enabling you to deliver customer-centric campaigns that beat your results over and over again. Benefits include:

  • Probni period od 14 dana bez obaveze.
  • Automatske kampanje koje koriste podatke uživo vaše Magento prodavnice koje pokreću prihod, uključujući napuštenu korpu, napušteno pregledanje, dopunu proizvoda i mnoge druge.
  • Ugrađeno rešenje za transakcione emailove.
  • Telefonska podrška i saveti marketinških stručnjaka uključeni.

All:
Signifyd automatically reviews your orders for fraud, telling you in seconds which orders to ship, and which to reject. We back our approvals with 100% chargeback protection, reimbursing you the full order amount plus fees should you ever receive a fraudulent chargeback.

Benefits:

  • Grow your business without fear of fraud
  • Accept more orders and maximize your revenue
  • Automate order review and shift fraud off your plate
Sve:
Signifyd automatski pregleda vaše porudžbine na prevare, govoreći vam u sekundama koje porudžbine da isporučite, a koje da odbijete. Naša odobrenja podržavamo sa 100% zaštitom od povraćaja, refundirajući vam pun iznos porudžbine plus naknade ako ikada dobijete lažni povraćaj.

Prednosti:

  • Razvijajte svoje poslovanje bez straha od prevara
  • Prihvatite više porudžbina i maksimizirajte prihod
  • Automatizujte pregled porudžbina i sklonite prevare sa svog zadatka
